issue_title: BUG [v0.49.12] React Client: broken reactivity for React 18 (works fine with React 17)
issue_body_preview:
package.json
```
    "boardgame.io": "~0.49.12",
    "react": "~18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "~18.2.0",
    "@types/react": "~18.0.20",
    "@types/react-dom": "~18.0.6",
    "typescript": "~4.8.3",

```
It modifies redux state, BUT do not rerender react component.
Works fine with React 17.0
test_description_zh: 在 React 18 环境下使用 boardgame.io 的 React Client，执行游戏操作（如走棋、点击按钮触发 move）后，观察页面上绑定的游戏状态（如棋盘、计分、当前玩家等）是否即时更新渲染。
expected_result_zh: 每次执行游戏操作后，React 组件应立即重新渲染，页面上显示的游戏状态（如棋盘布局、回合信息、玩家数据等）应与最新的 Redux 状态保持同步，无需手动刷新页面即可看到变化。
